compiled_state.title: RED: Write test verifying KNOWN-ISSUES template format and structure
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Write a bash test script at `tests/scripts/test-known-issues-template.sh` that verifies:
1. `plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md` exists
2. Template contains incident format sections (each placeholder incident has Keywords, Symptom, Root cause, Detection, Fix fields)
3. Template contains at least 3 placeholder incidents (using `### INC-` heading format)
4. Template contains adaptation guidance section
5. Template contains search tips header
6. Template contains incident entry format guide

This is the RED test task. The test MUST fail (exit non-zero) when `plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md` does not exist.

### TDD Requirement
Test file is the RED test itself. Will fail because the template file does not exist yet. After Task 2 creates the template, these tests turn GREEN.

### Test Approach
Each test function runs file existence checks and grep commands against the template file. Tests exercise the template's structural format — verifying required fields are present as headings or list items. This is valid structural testing per the metadata/schema validation exemption.

### File Impact
- Create: `tests/scripts/test-known-issues-template.sh`
- Edit: `.test-index` (add mapping for template → test)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file `tests/scripts/test-known-issues-template.sh` exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-known-issues-template.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 5 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" tests/scripts/test-known-issues-template.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Test exits non-zero (RED) when template does not exist
  Verify: ! bash tests/scripts/test-known-issues-template.sh 2>/dev/null
- [ ] `.test-index` entry maps `plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md` to `tests/scripts/test-known-issues-template.sh`
  Verify: grep -q 'plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md' .test-index

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — test exits non-zero (RED confirmed)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: tests/scripts/test-known-issues-template.sh, .test-index. Tests: 0 passed, 6 failed (RED by design).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Created RED test for KNOWN-ISSUES template at tests/scripts/test-known-issues-template.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
